_comment: Machine-readable provenance for citation metadata, keyed by corpus filename. Optional: ingestion falls back to sensible defaults (source = filename stem, retrieved_at = today, url = '') for any file without an entry, so dropping in a new document still indexes it. Human-readable companion + licensing: data/SOURCES.md.
